title: subworkflow - aws start ec2 instance
description:
Subworkflow to start an EC2 instance using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) The ID of the stopped EC2 instance to start
awsregion: (Required) The AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Waits for the start operation to complete
guide:
## ▶️ **Subworkflow to Start an EC2 Instance**

🚀 This subworkflow starts a stopped EC2 instance using AWS Systems Manager.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **instanceId**: 🆔 Instance ID
- **awsregion**: 🌍 AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection**: 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---
